source: RMC-BestFit/src/RMC.BestFit/Diagnostics/PriorPredictiveCheck.cs @ fc28c0c -- X11 SELF-COMPUTED structural smoke oracle. PriorPredictiveCheck (X10) samples 200 parameter sets from the Normal model priors (seeded), simulates a sample_size=30 dataset per draw, and summarizes the predictive mean/SD/min/max quantiles. For a Normal model every prior draw yields valid parameters, so number_of_valid_draws == 200 is the deterministic structural invariant reproduced bit-identically across C++/R/Python. X12 tightens the summary quantiles to an exact oracle against the real RMC.BestFit PriorPredictiveCheck via the emitter driver it must add.
